summary: Large lbaudio_ax decompilation/matching PR centered on src/melee/lb/lbaudio_ax.c, with supporting lbaudio_ax header/static-header type and prototype updates, one baselib axdriver symbol rename, and one ftcoll include addition. The bot report shows 6 new matches and 16 unmatched-item improvements, but also reports regressions in .bss, AXDriver_8038E034, fn_80023254, .sdata, and fn_800268B4. No human review comments were present in the loaded slice.

key_files.role: Primary decomp/matching body; adds or improves multiple lbAudioAx functions, adjusts includes, typed accesses, loops, switch/fallthrough logic, data padding, pan interpolation code, and audio bank/load logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.c include additions and fn_80023254 changes
raw_diff: implementations replacing markers for lbAudioAx_800233EC, lbAudioAx_80023B24, lbAudioAx_800243F4, fn_800253D8, fn_800256BC
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: 6 new matches and 16 improvements in main/melee/lb/lbaudio_ax

key_files.role: Static local type/data surface updated for lbaudio_ax: lbAudioAx_UserData fields expanded, lbAudioAx_PoolAlloc enlarged with named arrays/regions, static data and extern declarations adjusted.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbAudioAx_UserData replaces byte padding with fields x0, gobj, xC, x10, x14, x40
raw_diff: lbAudioAx_PoolAlloc grows from size 0xB4 to 0x1F554 with xB4/x194/x274/x354/x434/x514/x554/xD954
raw_diff: adds static sfx_remap_803BC6A4 and lbl_804D3870/lbl_804D3878

key_files.role: Public prototypes updated to match recovered signatures and remove some UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80027488, lbAudioAx_8002785C, lbAudioAx_80027AB0, lbAudioAx_80027DF8, lbAudioAx_80028690 prototype updates
raw_diff: function name AXDriver_8038E034 changed to HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: regression listed for main/sysdolphin/baselib/axdriver AXDriver_8038E034

key_files.role: Header declaration updated to match the axdriver rename.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: prototype AXDriver_8038E034 renamed to HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize

what_changed: Implemented several previously marked lbaudio_ax functions, including lbAudioAx_800233EC, lbAudioAx_80023B24, lbAudioAx_800243F4, fn_800253D8, and fn_800256BC in the loaded diff excerpt.
Improved existing lbaudio_ax functions such as fn_800251EC, fn_80025B44, and fn_80025CBC, with the bot report showing those three reaching 100.00%.
Converted some raw object/classifier access in fn_800251EC from a local HSD_GObj* plus *(u16*) cast to repeated access through lbAudioAx_UserData->entity and entity->classifier.
Added or exposed more structure in lbAudioAx_UserData and lbAudioAx_PoolAlloc in lbaudio_ax.static.h.
Updated lbaudio_ax.h prototypes for recovered return types and parameters.
Renamed baselib axdriver symbol AXDriver_8038E034 to HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize in both .c and .h.
Adjusted data/padding in lbaudio_ax.c, including data_pad_0 size changing from 0x1014 - 0xC80 to 0x144.
Bot report records overall matched code improvement of +0.05%/+1780 bytes and matched data improvement of +40 bytes.

smart_moves.title: Header signatures were updated alongside recovered bodies
smart_moves.details: lbaudio_ax.h changed UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS and an incorrect f32 return to concrete s32/void signatures for several functions, matching the standard that recovered bodies should update owning headers.

smart_moves.title: Opaque local structs were partially replaced with named fields
smart_moves.details: lbaudio_ax.static.h changed byte arrays in lbAudioAx_UserData into concrete fields and expanded lbAudioAx_PoolAlloc to expose field arrays used by lbaudio_ax.c.

smart_moves.title: Switch/fallthrough form was used for a range of hard-coded audio IDs
smart_moves.details: lbAudioAx_800243F4 uses a switch with explicit fallthrough comments and cumulative var_r6 increments rather than a raw branch ladder in the loaded diff.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered lbaudio function proves signatures, update lbaudio_ax.h rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or stale return types.
Recovering local structs can make audio code more reviewable: this PR replaces some padding and raw indexed state with lbAudioAx_UserData and lbAudioAx_PoolAlloc fields used by lbaudio_ax.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbAudioAx_80023B24 uses st->x274, st->xB4, st->x194, st->x354

decomp_lessons.lesson: Automated match reports can show useful wins while still surfacing regressions; record both, especially when a PR mixes code, data, header, and symbol-name changes.

naming_conventions.name: lbAudioAx_PoolAlloc fields

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use explicit counted for-loops for decrementing copy/shift loops.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80023254 changes do/while decrement loops to for (i = ...; i != 0; i--)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: Bot report lists fn_80023254 as regressed to 0.00%, so this tactic should not be promoted as successful for that function without more verification.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use switch with intentional fallthrough comments for cumulative case mapping.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbAudioAx_800243F4 switch cases with /* fallthrough */ and var_r6 increments
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: Supported by a bot-reported match for this function.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Duplicate similar pan interpolation bodies when needed for near-match progress.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_800253D8 and fn_800256BC implementations are highly similar

assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: Only improvement, not full match; no human review evidence says the duplication is preferred source style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce narrow dummy/no-op source shapes to affect codegen.

raw_diff: fn_80025CBC adds empty if (ud && ud) block
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: fn_80025B44 and fn_80025CBC 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: This is a matching tactic requiring explicit evidence and cleanup consideration under matching-tactics-need-evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use typed classifier field access instead of raw pointer casts when the object type is known.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_800251EC changes type = *(u16*) entity to entity->classifier
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: This aligns with typed-fields-over-pointer-math and has bot-reported match evidence in this PR.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Track data-section effects separately from text matches.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl bot report: .sdata2 match, .bss and .sdata regressions
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: The slice shows mixed data effects; data edits should be curator-reviewed before extracting any broader rule.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update owning headers when lbaudio_ax function bodies recover concrete signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2396 updates lbaudio_ax.h prototypes from f32 or UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete s32/void signatures while implementing or improving corresponding lbaudio_ax.c functions. This is a candidate local example of truthful header maintenance.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed classifier access can replace raw HSD_GObj classifier casts in lbaudio_ax
accepted_candidate_records.text: In fn_800251EC, the diff replaces a raw *(u16*) entity read with entity->classifier and the bot reports the function reached 100.00%. Candidate lesson: when HSD_GObj type information is available, use the typed field rather than raw casts.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Fallthrough switch matched lbAudioAx_800243F4
accepted_candidate_records.text: lbAudioAx_800243F4 uses a large switch with explicit fallthrough comments and cumulative increments; the bot report lists this function as 0.00% to 100.00%. Candidate tactic: for ordered ID remaps, test fallthrough switch forms before preserving branch ladders.

source_update_candidates.title: lbaudio_ax static header owns local audio userdata and pool allocator recovery
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2396 shows src/melee/lb/lbaudio_ax.static.h being used as the local owner for lbAudioAx_UserData and lbAudioAx_PoolAlloc definitions, with fields exposed to support src/melee/lb/lbaudio_ax.c matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.c uses lbl_80433710.x434 and st->x274/xB4/x194/x354
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for curator review; do not promote automatically because the slice includes data-section regressions and no human rationale.

source_update_candidates.title: AXDriver_8038E034 was renamed to HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize in PR 2396
source_update_candidates.text: The PR changes the function and header declaration name from AXDriver_8038E034 to HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible symbol/path fact, but curator should verify whether the semantic HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize name is backed by source, symbols, map, or later review, especially because the bot report lists AXDriver_8038E034 as a regression.

source_update_candidates.title: Empty no-op codegen steering blocks need explicit evidence and cleanup notes
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2396 includes empty if (ud && ud) blocks in fn_80025B44 and fn_80025CBC, while the bot reports both functions reaching 100.00%. This reinforces that such no-op steering is a narrow matching tactic requiring evidence, not normal style.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl bot report: fn_80025B44 and fn_80025CBC 100.00%
source_update_candidates.reason: May be redundant with existing matching-tactics-need-evidence standard; route to curator only as a supporting historical example.

source_update_candidates.title: Mixed code/data matching PRs should preserve report regressions in the ledger
source_update_candidates.text: The PR made lbaudio_ax text progress and .sdata2 progress, but the bot reported .bss and .sdata regressions plus an axdriver function regression. This is a candidate example for keeping data-section and adjacent-function regressions visible when reviewing code-match PRs.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl bot report: matched code +1780 bytes
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential supporting example for existing verification-and-regression-ledger and text-before-data-matching standards.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all lbaudio_ax functions in the PR were fully matched; the bot report distinguishes 6 new matches from 16 partial improvements.

Do not treat the AXDriver_8038E034 to HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize rename as globally validated source truth from this slice alone; no reviewer/source rationale is loaded and the bot report flags a regression for AXDriver_8038E034.
Do not promote empty no-op blocks such as if (ud && ud) as normal source style; they are only observed as a matching tactic with bot-reported evidence in two functions.
Do not claim data-section cleanup success broadly; the bot report includes .bss and .sdata regressions despite .sdata2 improvement.
Do not infer human reviewer approval of specific tactics; the loaded slice has no review comments.
